## 5. Skeleton Plan

```
backend/
├── main.py                     # FastAPI app, CORS, WebSocket router
├── api/
│   ├── routes/
│   │   ├── projects.py         # Project CRUD endpoints
│   │   ├── agents.py           # Agent management endpoints
│   │   ├── pipeline.py         # Pipeline run/status endpoints
│   │   ├── documents.py        # Document view/export endpoints
│   │   └── websocket.py        # WebSocket connection handler
│   └── dependencies/
│       ├── db.py               # SQLAlchemy session dependency
│       └── llm.py              # LLM client factory (Ollama/OpenAI)
├── models/                     # SQLModel table definitions (one per DB table)
├── schemas/                    # Pydantic request/response schemas
├── services/
│   ├── agent_runner.py         # Agent execution orchestration
│   ├── pipeline_service.py     # Pipeline step state machine
│   └── document_service.py     # Document create/version/export
└── agents/
    ├── requirement_agent.py    # Requirement Agent implementation
    ├── gap_analysis_agent.py   # Gap Analysis Agent implementation
    └── ...                     # One file per agent

frontend/
├── src/
│   ├── pages/                  # One file per screen (UI-XXX)
│   ├── components/             # Shared components
│   ├── hooks/                  # Custom React hooks (useWebSocket, useAgent)
│   ├── api/                    # API client functions
│   ├── stores/                 # State management
│   └── types/                  # TypeScript type definitions
└── public/
```

---

## 6. Dependencies

### Python (pip)

| Package | Version | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| fastapi | ≥0.111.0 | Backend framework |
| uvicorn | ≥0.29.0 | ASGI server |
| sqlmodel | ≥0.0.18 | ORM + Pydantic integration |
| sqlalchemy | ≥2.0.0 | Database ORM |
| alembic | ≥1.13.0 | DB migrations |
| psycopg2-binary | ≥2.9.9 | PostgreSQL driver |
| pgvector | ≥0.2.5 | Vector similarity extension |
| python-dotenv | ≥1.0.0 | Environment variables |
| ollama | ≥0.2.0 | Ollama Python client |
| openai | ≥1.30.0 | OpenAI Python client |
| pydantic | ≥2.7.0 | Data validation |

### Node.js (npm)

| Package | Version | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| react | ^18.3.0 | UI framework |
| react-dom | ^18.3.0 | DOM rendering |
| vite | ^5.3.0 | Build tool |
| typescript | ^5.4.0 | Type safety |
| tailwindcss | ^3.4.0 | Styling |
| @radix-ui/react-* | latest | shadcn/ui primitives |
| react-router-dom | ^6.24.0 | Client-side routing |
| axios | ^1.7.0 | HTTP client |
| zustand | ^4.5.0 | State management |
| react-markdown | ^9.0.0 | Markdown rendering |
